# Template retrieved from a map, accessed via closure, catches missing field errors.

! check-templates
stderr 'base\.html.*Missing not found on example\.com/app\.Page \(E001\)'

-- go.mod --
module example.com/app

go 1.25.0
-- main.go --
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"html/template"
	"net/http"
)

type Page struct {
	Title string
}

func main() {
	templates := make(map[string]*template.Template)
	templates["index"] = template.Must(template.ParseFiles("templates/base.html"))

	render := func(w http.ResponseWriter, name string, data any) {
		t, ok := templates[name]
		if !ok {
			http.Error(w, "not found", 500)
			return
		}
		_ = t.ExecuteTemplate(w, "base.html", data)
	}

	http.HandleFunc("/", func(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
		render(w, "index", Page{Title: "Home"})
	})
}

var _ = fmt.Sprint

-- templates/base.html --
<h1>{{.Title}}</h1>
<p>{{.Missing}}</p>
